name: pm-calculators
description: Executable business calculators & models — each ships a stdlib script: Unit Economics (LTV/CAC), SaaS Metrics (NRR/quick ratio), Runway (default alive/dead), Pricing, ROI/NPV — plus computed models that emit real .xlsx with live formulas: cohort curve fitting (LTV), Monte Carlo runway (P10/P50/P90), and Van Westendorp pricing. Verifiable math, not vibes.
